metadata.description: Utah 2026 bighorn sheep hunt opportunities dataset built from the official Utah DWR hunt table.
assumptionNotes: RS hunts are treated as Rocky Mountain bighorn sheep hunts.
DS hunts are treated as desert bighorn sheep hunts.
DA hunts are treated as antlerless bighorn sheep hunts and grouped under Desert Bighorn unless a better official source indicates otherwise.
Weapon is currently set to Any Legal Weapon for planner compatibility because the official hunt table does not provide a weapon field.
